distinctive_elements: Most music removed in USA localization compared to Japanese version

extraction_notes: Wikipedia source contains gameplay, plot, character, and localization information but no documented music parameters including tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics. The only audio-related mention is that 'the USA version of the game modified several things from the original Japanese version such as removing most of the music.' No composer, sound chip, channel count, or detailed track information is documented in available sources.
